text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow! Is this present for me? You're the best!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...Don't get your hopes up too high. I don't have a
great eye for these kinds of things.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Awww, hearing that only makes me more
curious...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, huh? This wrapping paper... Isn't it from
that sporting goods shop?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...It's a hammer for your cleats. Weren't you
thinking about buying a new one recently?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Didn't I tell you to not get too excited? ...If
you're not going to use it, I will.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! I'll use it, I'll use it! Sorry, you just surprised
me, that's all!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Ayabe, you don't need to put yourself down
like that, 'kay? I'm actually kinda jealous of how
considerate you are!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And thanks again for the present! I'll take real
good care of it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Knock yourself out. It's yours now, anyway.
